name: Central
reason: Central Line: Minor delays between Leytonstone and Hainault via Newbury Park due to a points failure at Hainault. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.

name: Metropolitan
reason: Metropolitan Line: Severe delays between Wembley Park and Aldgate due to an earlier fire alert near Finchley Road. Please use the Jubilee line and Circle line to complete your journey. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.

name: Piccadilly
reason: PICCADILLY LINE: Saturday 25 and Sunday 26 April, no service between Rayners Lane and Uxbridge. Use METROPOLITAN LINE services instead.

name: Waterloo & City
reason: Waterloo & City line: service operates 06:00 until 00:30, Monday to Friday only. There is no service on Saturdays, Sundays and on bank/public holidays.
